failure_rule: For each processed model: page CER >= 0.80 AND (GPT-4o score <= 2 OR missing-output rate >= 0.30). A shared failure satisfies the rule for both models.
future_directions: Improve word segmentation and crop margins
Select preprocessing condition per image rather than globally
Ensemble Surya and Tesseract with confidence-aware routing
Route high-risk pages to human review
Train or adapt a Telugu handwriting recognizer
interpretation_limit: Associations are descriptive and do not establish causation.
